ar.param.value.description: Value to set (encoded as UTF-8 or int bytes).
ar.msg.summary: ECHONET Lite property set completed: {ip_address} / {epc} in {elapsed_ms} ms.
ar.err.invalid_ip_address: Error: ip_address must be a valid IPv4 address.
ar.err.invalid_epc: Error: epc must be a valid 1-byte hex code.
ar.err.invalid_edt: Error: edt must be a valid hex string.
ar.err.value_required: Error: either value or edt is required.
ar.tool.description: Set one ECHONET Lite property on a node and return a JSON or text result.
ar.param.eoj.description: Optional target EOJ (e.g. '013001'). If omitted, the node profile object is used.
ar.param.obj.description: Optional object code to narrow the queried object (e.g. '0130').
ar.param.epc.description: ECHONET Lite property code (EPC), for example '80' or 'D5'.
ar.param.edt.description: Optional raw EDT hex string to send. Takes precedence over value when provided.

uk.param.epc.description: ECHONET Lite property code (EPC), for example '80' or 'D5'.
uk.param.edt.description: Optional raw EDT hex string to send. Takes precedence over value when provided.

vi.param.value.description: Value to set (encoded as UTF-8 or int bytes).
vi.msg.summary: ECHONET Lite property set completed: {ip_address} / {epc} in {elapsed_ms} ms.
vi.err.invalid_ip_address: Error: ip_address must be a valid IPv4 address.
vi.err.invalid_epc: Error: epc must be a valid 1-byte hex code.
vi.err.invalid_edt: Error: edt must be a valid hex string.
vi.err.value_required: Error: either value or edt is required.
vi.tool.description: Set one ECHONET Lite property on a node and return a JSON or text result.

vi.param.obj.description: Optional object code to narrow the queried object (e.g. '0130').
vi.param.epc.description: ECHONET Lite property code (EPC), for example '80' or 'D5'.
vi.param.edt.description: Optional raw EDT hex string to send. Takes precedence over value when provided.
